# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: frontend

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: ""
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backend-api
        image: backend-api:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: backend-api

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: auth-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "info"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: auth-service
        image: auth-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: http
        - containerPort: 9091
          name: grpc
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  - port: 9091
    targetPort: 9091
    protocol: TCP
    name: grpc
  selector:
    app: auth-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: postgres:14
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5432
          name: postgres
        env:
        - name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
          value: "changeme"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 2Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
    protocol: TCP
    name: postgres
  selector:
    app: database-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "misc:info"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeOutboundIPRanges: "10.0.0.0/8"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: notification-service
        image: notification-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: notification-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/statsInclusionPrefixes: "cluster.outbound,cluster_manager,listener_manager,http_mixer_filter,tcp_mixer_filter,server,cluster.xds-grpc"
        sidecar.istio.io/interceptionMode: "REDIRECT"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: payment-service
        image: payment-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: payment-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: analytics-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: analytics-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/status: '{"version":"","initContainers":["istio-init"],"containers":["istio-proxy"]}'
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeInboundPorts: "9092"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: analytics-service
        image: analytics-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        - containerPort: 9092
          name: metrics
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 150m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 750m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: analytics-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  - port: 9092
    targetPort: 9092
    protocol: TCP
    name: metrics
  selector:
    app: analytics-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: legacy-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: legacy-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: legacy-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: legacy-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: legacy-service
        image: legacy-service:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: legacy-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: legacy-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: legacy-service

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyConcurrency: "4"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "6379"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: cache-service
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
    name: redis
  selector:
    app: cache-service
